title: micropera loheri
intro: Micropera loheri, also known as the Indian snake grass, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, Micropera loheri is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Micropera loheri can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or paste, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
